_publications._publicationTitle: Capturing the wide variety of impaired fracture healing phenotypes in Neurofibromatosis Type 1 with eight key factors: a computational study.

_contextSnippet: it can be noted from Figs 5, 6 that a wide range of CI values (0.01-0.89) were predicted by the computational model
details: Predicted wide range of CI values (0.01-0.89) capturing variety of impaired fracture healing phenotypes
